conceptExplanation.en: OF10 — To assign work. Source document SC102-2/10-2005F. Grammar taught: present, pronouns. Vocabulary: the OF10 section of the PFL2 Lexique. 100 questions, all traceable to the PFL2 source (21 verbatim source activities + 79 from the OF10 Lexique).

consolidation.note: Consolidation review (OF 1–12) draws only from the source-traceable banks of the objectives in this range.
